name: Pier 70
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Minutes
documents.creator: San Francisco Port Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: 2004 Port Commission minutes on Southern Waterfront planning that describe Pier 70 as home of the ship repair industry and flag brownfield clean-up needs.

documents.title: Agendas and Minutes / San Francisco Port Commission
documents.creator: San Francisco Port Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2015 Port Commission agenda presenting the Forest City mixed-use plan for the Pier 70 Waterfront Site, a proposed Pier 70 Special Use District, and a BAE Systems ship-repair lease of about 14.4 acres and 19 buildings.

documents.title: Agenda
documents.creator: San Francisco Port Commission
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2011 Port Commission agenda on the Pier 70 Waterfront Site RFQ and environmental consulting for the Pier 70 Brownfield Site Investigation, noting a $2.28 million Department of Defense award for clean-up.

documents.title: Container terminal options
documents.creator: Moffatt & Nichol, Engineers,San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1986 Mission Bay study evaluating a consolidated Pier 70 and 80 container terminal against separate terminals at Piers 50, 70 and 80.
